scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n gw,auth,crm,fin,hr,inv,acc,notif,mfg,asset,an "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:crm" "npm run dev:finance" "npm run dev:hr" "npm run dev:inventory" "npm run dev:accounting" "npm run dev:notification" "npm run dev:manufacturing" "npm run dev:asset" "npm run dev:analytics"
scripts.dev:gateway: AUTH_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3001 CRM_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3002 FINANCE_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3003 HR_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3004 INVENTORY_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3005 ACCOUNTING_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3006 NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3011 MANUFACTURING_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3012 ASSET_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3013 ANALYTICS_SERVICE_URL=http://localhost:3010 npm run start --prefix services/gateway
